summary: Completed testing of Live Corner Pressure Intelligence feature. Backend pure functions and API endpoints work correctly with 7/9 tests passing. Two logic refinements needed in corner recommendation engine. Frontend component structure verified but UI testing limited due to no live matches currently available.

logic_refinements_needed.issue: Engine recommends corners when xG > 0.80, but should prefer goal markets instead
logic_refinements_needed.expected_behavior: should_recommend=False when xG > 0.80 (prefer goal markets over corner markets)
logic_refinements_needed.impact: MEDIUM - May recommend corner markets when goal markets are more appropriate
logic_refinements_needed.suggested_fix: Add explicit check in evaluate_live_corner_market(): if xG > 0.80 and high shot quality, set should_recommend=False regardless of corner pressure score

logic_refinements_needed.issue: avoid_markets returns empty array when it should warn against goal markets
logic_refinements_needed.current_behavior: avoid_markets=[] even when control_without_goal_depth conditions are met
logic_refinements_needed.expected_behavior: avoid_markets should include ['Over 2.5 goles', 'Ambos equipos anotan: Sí', 'Siguiente gol'] when xG < 0.70 OR (sot <= 2 AND total_goals <= 2)
logic_refinements_needed.impact: LOW - Missing user guidance on which markets to avoid
logic_refinements_needed.root_cause: TEST A has xg_home=0.95 which is > 0.70, so avoid_markets logic correctly doesn't trigger. The test expectation may need adjustment, OR the logic should be more nuanced (e.g., check if control_without_goal_depth=True OR psg_benchmark=True)

ui_testing_limitations.issue: Cannot fully test UI because no live football matches are currently available
ui_testing_limitations.verification_done: Component code structure verified with all required data-testid attributes present
ui_testing_limitations.workaround: Component only renders when match.is_live=true AND sport='football'. Currently 0 live matches in top 5 leagues.

passed_tests: ✅ TEST A - PSG canonical case: should_recommend=True, recommended_market='Total Corners Over 6.5', confidence=97, risk=LOW, all reason_codes present including PSG_ARSENAL_BENCHMARK_MATCH
✅ TEST B - No corners: Correctly returns should_recommend=False when no corner pressure exists
✅ TEST D - Downgrade when leading: Correctly applies downgrade_due_to_lead=True and should_recommend=False
✅ POST /api/football/live/territorial_control: Returns corner_recommendation with all required fields, persists to live_corner_evaluations collection
✅ GET /api/football/live/corner_intelligence/history: Returns evaluation history with proper schema (2 documents found)
✅ Regression test: Existing territorial control features (territorial, corner, ranked_markets, evaluation_id) still work correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Two logic refinements needed in /app/backend/services/live_corner_engine.py: (1) Add explicit check to NOT recommend corners when xG > 0.80 (prefer goal markets), (2) Review avoid_markets logic to ensure it triggers appropriately for PSG-benchmark scenarios. Both are MEDIUM/LOW priority - core functionality works correctly.

success_percentage.frontend_ui: N/A (0 live matches available for testing, component structure verified)

test_c_high_xg.reason: Engine recommends based on corner pressure score alone, doesn't check if xG is too high for corner markets

avoid_markets_logic.reason: Logic requires xg < 0.70, but TEST A has xg=0.95. May need to adjust test or logic.

login_ui.verified: Login form works, redirects to dashboard

live_section.verified: En Vivo section exists, shows 'No hay partidos en vivo' message

corner_intelligence_card.reason: No live matches available to trigger component rendering
corner_intelligence_card.code_review: Component has all required data-testid attributes and proper structure
